title: Buyer creates a Letter-of-Intent PO (LoI flag)
user_persona: Buyer issuing an LoI ahead of full PO terms

conversation.user: I need to issue a Letter of Intent purchase order to SUP-LOI-9 to lock in pricing while we finalize terms. Quantity is not final yet.

bot_must: recognise LoI intent and set loi flag
explain LoI POs allow uncommitted quantities and tentative terms — final amend will commit them
ask for the indicative slots (price, est qty, validity period)

conversation.user: Item ITM-LOI-1, indicative qty 1000, price locked at 12 USD, valid 60 days.

bot_must: tag quantity as indicative, not firm
ask for header slots if not yet given

conversation.user: Currency USD, buyer BUY-15, numbering PO/LOI/2026, today.

bot_must: report LoI PO created, status Draft
note that final firm PO requires a separate Amend to convert from LoI to firm

evaluation_metrics.loi_detection: 'Letter of Intent' or 'LoI' phrase triggers loi flag
evaluation_metrics.tentative_qty_handling: quantity treated as indicative when LoI is set
